channel.title: Audio on Deal Ledger
channel.description: Recent content in Audio on Deal Ledger

item.title: HyperX Cloud III Gaming Headset
item.description: Wired HyperX Cloud III headset with clear mic pickup and multi-platform support.

item.title: Ray-Ban Meta Wayfarer Smart Glasses
item.description: Ray-Ban Meta Wayfarer smart glasses with camera capture and open-ear audio.

item.title: Sony HT-S100F Soundbar
item.description: Compact Sony soundbar with integrated tweeter and Bluetooth support.

item.title: Soundcore Life Q30 Noise-Cancelling Headphones
item.description: Wireless over-ear ANC headphones with strong battery life and comfort-first design.

item.title: Noise-cancelling over-ears
item.description: Wireless Sony ANC headphones with long battery life.

item.title: soundcore Noise Cancelling Headphones
item.description: Adaptive ANC headphones with 50-hour battery life.

item.title: CORSAIR HS80 RGB Wireless Headset
item.description: Wireless Dolby Atmos headset for console and PC.

item.title: ULTIMEA Soundbar with Subwoofer
item.description: 5.1 soundbar system with subwoofer and rear speakers.
